issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as authentication failures and external API errors.

scenarios.name: Wire a Next.js frontend to Xano signup/login/me endpoints
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the documented /api:auth/auth/signup, /auth/login, and /auth/me routes on the instance URL and forwards the returned authToken as a Bearer token; baseline often invents endpoint paths or assumes a different auth scheme.

scenarios.name: Build a 'create post' function stack with free-plan limit
scenarios.rationale: Treatment describes the function stack steps from the skill (precondition auth, conditional on plan/post_count, Add Record, Return) rather than writing server code; baseline writes a generic Express handler that ignores Xano's visual function-stack model.
